config.script:
'nx_section #include "50560"
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment 'g_oCurrentPRS - przetwarzane zadanie #comment 'g_oNXArrayMagPRS - tablica przydzielonych 'wydan' z danego magazynu #comment '-------------------------------------------------------------------
dim g_oCurrentPRS : set g_oCurrentPRS = nothing dim g_oNXArrayMagPRS : set g_oNXArrayMagPRS = nx_.new_array()
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment '1. initializuj dla dokumentu #comment '-------------------------------------------------------------------
function initialize_from_dok(byval iSrcDokType,byval iSrcDokIdObj) dim pM60227 : set pM60227 = doc_.getmodule(60227)
select case iSrcDokType case TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE dim oZamowienie : set oZamowienie = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5ZAMOWIENIE,iSrcDokIdObj) set g_oCurrentPRS = pM60227.nx_zamowienie_2_prod_request(oZamowienie) end select
end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment '2. sprobuj wydac z podanego magazynu - zwraca true gdy wszystko sie udalo #comment '-------------------------------------------------------------------
function apply_initial_mag(byval idMag) dim oMagPRS : set oMagPRS = prepare_for_mag(g_oCurrentPRS,idMag) g_oNXArrayMagPRS.add oMagPRS apply_initial_mag = (g_oCurrentPRS.count = 0) end function
#comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' 3. wyniki #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- function get_request_prs() set get_request_prs = g_oCurrentPRS end function
function get_mag_prss() set get_mag_prss = g_oNXArrayMagPRS end function #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- #comment ' #comment '------------------------------------------------------------------- function fopen() : fopen = true frefresh end function
function frefresh() page_.ctrl(CTRLID_RESULTS).removeall if not g_oCurrentPRS is nothing then page_.addxml CTRLID_RESULTS, nx_build_ui() end if end function
function prepare_for_mag(byref oInputPRS,byval idMag) dim pM60227 : set pM60227 = doc_.getmodule(60227) set prepare_for_mag = pM60227.nx_prod_request_realize(oInputPRS,idMag) end function
function nx_build_ui_PRE(byref oPRE,byref oNXAspator,byval strRowAttrib) with oNXAspator .newrowex strRowAttrib dim oProdukt : set oProdukt = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPRE.id_produkt) #ifdef APPCONFIG_RAPORT_BY_PROD_INX .newcell.e_label_link_open_obj oProdukt.strIndeks,TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPRE.id_produkt .c_longlabel oProdukt.strNazwa #else .newcell.e_label_link_open_obj oProdukt.strNazwa,TYPEID_N5PRODUKT,oPRE.id_produkt .c_longlabel oProdukt.strIndeks #endif .c_label_currency oPRE.quantity, oProdukt.pJednostkaEwid.strSkrot, _ oProdukt.pJednostkaEwid.nDokladnosc - 1 end with end function
function nx_build_ui_PRS(byref oPRS,byref oNXAspator,byval iIndex) with oNXAspator .newrowex "style='STYLE_TABLE_HEADER'" #ifdef APPCONFIG_RAPORT_BY_PROD_INX .c_label "Indeks" .c_label "Nazwa" #else .c_label "Nazwa" .c_label "Indeks" #endif .c_label "Ilość" dim iter for iter = 0 to oPRS.count - 1 dim oPRE : set oPRE = oPRS.get_entry(iter)
dim strRowAttrib if iter mod 2 = 0 then strRowAttrib = "backcolor='#E6E6FA' bordercolor='#006697' border='1'" else strRowAttrib = "style='STYLE_TABLE_BODY'" end if nx_build_ui_PRE oPRE,oNXAspator,strRowAttrib next
if iIndex >= 0 then .newrowex "style='STYLE_ROW_BTN'" .newcellex RESULT_SPAN,"align='right'" .e_button "Usuń","","varFunctionHLI=""on_remove_mag_by_inx"" vn1=""" + cstr(iIndex) + """","" end if end with
end function
function nx_build_ui() dim pStream : set pStream = doc_.createstreamobj() dim pNXAspator : set pNXAspator = nx_.new_aspator() with pNXAspator .init pStream .newtableex "" .newsection "thead",RESULT_SPAN .newgroup 1,"" .newsectionex "tbody",RESULT_SPAN, "" '--------- co pozostalo .newgroup 2,"Pozostałe zapotrzebowanie" '--------- dla kazdego magazynu co przydzielone nx_build_ui_PRS g_oCurrentPRS,pNXAspator,-1 dim iter for iter = 0 to g_oNXArrayMagPRS.upper_index dim oItemPRS : set oItemPRS = g_oNXArrayMagPRS(iter) dim oMagazyn : set oMagazyn = trans_.getobj(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,oItemPRS.id_magazyn) .newgroup 2,oMagazyn.strNazwa nx_build_ui_PRS oItemPRS,pNXAspator,iter next .flush end with #ifdef _DEBUG pStream.save "c:\temp\60305_nx_build_ui.txt" #endif pStream.rewind set nx_build_ui = pStream end function
function on_add_magazyn() dim strExludeList : strExludeList = "n5magazyn.idobj not in (0" dim iter for iter = 0 to g_oNXArrayMagPRS.upper_index strExludeList = strExludeList + "," + cstr(g_oNXArrayMagPRS(iter).id_magazyn) next strExludeList = strExludeList + ")"
dim idMag : idMag = nx_fire_choice_list(TYPEID_N5MAGAZYN,"",strExludeList,"") if idMag <> 0 then dim oMagPRS : set oMagPRS = prepare_for_mag(g_oCurrentPRS,idMag) g_oNXArrayMagPRS.add oMagPRS frefresh end if end function
function on_remove_mag_by_inx(byref oHLI) dim iIndex : iIndex = clng(oHLI(1)) g_oCurrentPRS.merge_back g_oNXArrayMagPRS(iIndex) g_oNXArrayMagPRS.remove iIndex frefresh end function
function on_accept() page_.result = 1 page_.goback end function function on_cancel() page_.result = 0 page_.goback end function
